text:
We make money on the spread — the difference between what backers and layers are willing to pay or accept on any given outcome. When you place an order on Novig, you're matched against other users on the other side of that bet. We don't take a cut of your stake or winnings; instead, the pricing you see already reflects our edge built into the market.

It's similar to how a traditional exchange works: we facilitate the match, set the odds, and profit from the gap between buy and sell prices rather than a per-transaction fee.

That said, the specifics of how pricing works and what margins apply to different markets are details a human can walk you through if you want more depth before you add funds.

Novig Support
